stimulus:
Welcome! In this study, you will play three short video games, completing a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":5,"creativity-free-response":"It was very confusing and complicated, I often struggle with those kind of games, also it required the player to be intuitive as there were barely any instructions given to help you.","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"The incorporation of music and timing your actions to a beat was very new to me,.","effectiveness-rating":1,"effectiveness-free-response":"I struggle to catch on to newer games in general but that combined with the few instructions given really frustrated me and made me feel very stupid. The controls were also very janky and randomly stiff at times.","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":5,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I gave a 4 for the authentic rating feel as I feel as if the game is designed for people who are musically inclined as a lot of the game just seemed overly complicated, especially with the designs of the circles.\nI rated intentionality and effort as a 5. There definitely is an intention to the game as I feel as if the games design and especially sound design is purposefully quiet and lo-fi like in order to suck you into the game.  I can only imagine the developer put a lot of effort into the game, the art style was cool and futuristic.\n"}

emergency_text: I had 4:08 minutes left on my second game, and it has just crashed, I was captured by the green thing, the screen is telling me to press R to restart but the screen is frozen.

response: {"creativity-rating":3,"creativity-free-response":"It is a game that primarily relies on stealth and speed, I have played games like this before. I feel as if it is a combination of pac man and metal gear solid.","originality-rating":2,"originality-free-response":"It has a lot of the same mechanics you see in other stealth games. One thing I like though was the ability to use decoys, I found that very refreshing and unique.","effectiveness-rating":5,"effectiveness-free-response":"The instructions were clear and easier to understand. Also I really liked the tense situations the gameplay created, I was constantly on the edge of my seat wondering if I was going to get caught.","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"authenticity: It plays like a lot of other stealth games, I don't think it is fair to call it a rip off though, it had quite a few unique features and the down to earth visuals really give an authentic indie feel to the game.\nintentionality, and effort: the outlay of the puzzle I feel was very intentional, the developer obviously knows how to create tension in a video game and I don't think its possible to do that by accident or without a lot of effort."}
